figures.caption: Figure 48: OCEAN scores for gemma-3-12b-it on SJTs, under MDS injections with s = 1, using the best-performing layer ℓ for each trait-direction pair and 10 equidistant α values from 0 (no steering) to the best-performing α. From top to bottom, rows show openness, conscientiousness, extraversion, agreeableness, and neuroticism results. Negative α steers away from the target construct, and positive α steers toward it. Fluency was evaluated only in the responses to the corresponding SJTs. Vertical lines indicate some nonfluent SJT responses.

Table 6: Summary of the conscientiousness injection sweeps on Qwen3-1.7B, with injection stride s = 1. ϕ1,C,d scores represent the strongest steering effect toward (d =↑) or away from (d =↓) the construct across all LLM layers. ∆0 = ϕ1,C,d − µ0 C, where µ0 C denotes the base model’s mean conscientiousness score. ∆P2 = ϕ1,C,d − µP2 C , where µP2 C denotes the P2-steered model’s mean conscientiousness score. Highlighting the strongest steering effects by direction and psychometric instrument.
